title: Require Stage Authoring Owner Shape
forbids: standard recipe stages missing createStage ownership, importing domain or operation config facades, or using recipe-wide public-config helper modules outside the owning stage directory
why: Stages own authoring configuration, knobs, public schema composition, and public-to-step compile mappings. Domain modules provide primitives and policy; recipe-wide config helper bags are not destination authority. This rule is advisory until the known current red rows are burned down, then it should be promoted to enforced with an empty baseline.
remediate: Move stage authoring schema/compile helpers into the owning stage directory and import domain primitives from model/schemas or model/policy instead of @mapgen/domain/*/config.js or operation-local config buckets.
message: Stage authoring surfaces must stay with the owning stage and avoid config facades.
